nasb.text: The strong among the mighty ones shall speak of him and his helpers from the midst of Sheol, ‘They have gone down, they lie still, the uncircumcised, slain by the sword.’

esv.text: The mighty chiefs shall speak of them, with their helpers, out of the midst of Sheol: ‘They have come down, they lie still, the uncircumcised, slain by the sword.’

cnv.text: 勇士中最強的必在陰間論到埃及和幫助埃及的說：‘他們已經下來了，他們與沒有受割禮的，就是被刀所殺的人，一起長眠。’

ccb.text: 英勇的统领要在阴间谈论埃及王和他的盟友说，‘这些丧身刀下、未受割礼的人下来长眠了。’
